source.definition: feeling unable to cope because too much is demanded or expected from someone

explanation.sourceText: The word "overwhelmed" comes from the prefix "over-" combined with the verb "whelm," meaning to cover or engulf. It describes a state where someone is overcome by demands or pressure beyond their capacity.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul „überfordert“ este format din prefixul „über-“ și verbul „fordern“. Descrie situația în care se cere mai mult decât poate face cineva.

source.additional: It is often used to describe stress related to work or responsibilities.

target.definition: când cineva ist cerut să facă mai mult decât poate gestiona

explanation.sourceText: The Romanian word "depășit" derives from the Latin "depassare," meaning "to exceed" or "to go beyond." It describes a state that goes beyond someone's capacity.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul românesc „depășit“ provine din latină „depassare“, care înseamnă „a depăși“. Descrie o stare care depășește capacitatea cuiva.

target.additional: Wird verwendet, um Überlastung durch Arbeit oder Verantwortung auszudrücken.

examples.sourceText: I feel overwhelmed by all the tasks.
examples.targetText: Mă simt depășit de toate sarcinile.

examples.sourceText: He was overwhelmed and couldn't do anything anymore.
examples.targetText: Era depășit și nu mai putea face nimic.

examples.sourceText: Many employees feel overwhelmed by high demands.
examples.targetText: Mulți angajați se simt depășiți de cerințe ridicate.

examples.sourceText: An overwhelmed person often needs support.
examples.targetText: O persoană depășită are adesea nevoie de sprijin.

examples.sourceText: Being overwhelmed can lead to serious problems.
examples.targetText: Depășirea poate duce la probleme grave.

examples.sourceText: He felt overwhelmed because of responsibilities.
examples.targetText: Se simțea depășit din cauza responsabilităților.

learningTips.text: Think of "overwhelmed" as being "over the top" with too much to handle, just like the Romanian "depășit" means going beyond your limits.
Remember "depășit" by linking it to the English word "pass" in "surpass"—both imply going beyond what you can manage.
Imagine a person drowning in work to recall "overwhelmed" and "depășit" as feeling buried under too many demands.
Use the phrase "I am overwhelmed" to practice the feeling of "depășit," which means being asked to do more than you can handle.
